emails.subject: extension
emails.body: extension Hi Vince, Hope things are going well in Houston. I am presently in Illinois. It has been pretty hectic. I will call soon to catch up. In the mean time, may I request that my leave be extended by another week? Thanks very much. Rakesh

emails.subject: RE: extension
emails.body: RE: extension Rakesh, I can extend you leave of absence till January 15. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: RE: extension
emails.body: Vince, Thanks for the extension. Rakesh

emails.subject: RE: extension
emails.body: Rakesh, You will receive an update on the situation tomorrow. Vince
